topic: A student discovers their teacher follows them on social media
raw_output:
[story 1]

Maya practically vibrated in her seat, a wide, bright smile stretching across her face as she scrolled through her phone. She had just posted a triumphant selfie celebrating acing a notoriously difficult history exam, and then, there it was: a notification from Mr. Harrison’s account. Her breath hitched. It was him. He had liked the picture. A genuine, heart-warming little digital acknowledgment. A wave of pure, unadulterated joy washed over her, making her want to jump right out of her chair. She quickly minimized the app, her fingers tingling with excitement, a bubbling energy making her want to shout.

[story 2]

"Oh my gosh, you won't believe this!" Liam practically bounced on the balls of his feet as he walked down the hallway, his grin so wide it seemed to split his face. He’d seen the notification pop up—Mr. Davies had tagged him in a group photo from the recent field trip, and now he was following Liam back. A giddy lightness filled his chest, making his steps quick and bouncy. He couldn't stop smiling; the sheer delight of the unexpected connection was making him feel light as air, like he could float.

[story 3]

I stared at the screen, my heart doing a frantic little tap dance against my ribs. When I saw the follow request from Ms. Evans, I actually let out a little squeak. A huge, goofy grin spread across my face, pulling at the corners of my eyes. It felt like a secret, wonderful punchline had landed just for me. I immediately started typing a ridiculously enthusiastic reply, my thumbs flying across the keyboard with a speed fueled by sheer, bubbling happiness. I couldn't contain the feeling; I wanted to share this wonderful news with the entire world right then and there.
